mining_card.description: The hero component. Needs to feel like a vault or a high-tech engine.
structure: Footer: Progress Bar (Thin, Glowing) + Rate Info

styling.container: relative overflow-hidden rounded-[2rem] border transition-all duration-500

action_button.description: The 'Collect' or 'Start' trigger. Must be tactile.
action_button.classes: relative w-full py-4 rounded-xl font-bold text-lg overflow-hidden transition-all active:scale-[0.98]

variants.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-zinc-800 to-zinc-900 text-white border border-zinc-700 shadow-lg hover:shadow-zinc-800/50
variants.gold: bg-gradient-to-r from-amber-400 to-amber-600 text-black border border-amber-400/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(245,158,11,0.5)]

stats_grid.item_classes: p-4 rounded-2xl bg-white/50 dark:bg-zinc-900/50 border border-slate-100 dark:border-zinc-800/50 backdrop-blur-md

progress_bar.description: Subtle yet precise. No chunky bars.
progress_bar.container: h-1.5 w-full bg-slate-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden

number_ticker.description: Use framer-motion for smooth number transitions instead of raw JS intervals if possible, or keep the optimized interval logic but style the numbers better.

implementation_steps.step_1: Structure Update - Simplify the main container. Remove 'AuroraBackground' and 'FloatingBubbles' which cause visual noise. Replace with subtle 'NoiseTexture' or 'MeshGradient'.
implementation_steps.step_2: Color Overhaul - Replace all hardcoded hex values and 'emerald-50' gradients with the new Semantic Palette (Zinc/Slate/Amber).
implementation_steps.step_3: Typography - Apply Space Grotesk to Headings, JetBrains Mono to Numbers.
implementation_steps.step_4: Card Redesign - Implement the 'Glass Obsidian' card style. Add the 1px border interaction.
implementation_steps.step_5: Accessibility - Ensure text contrast ratios (Amber text on White needs checking, prefer Amber-600 on White, Amber-400 on Black).

instructions_to_main_agent:
Your goal is to make this look like a 'Fintech Pro' app, not a 'Candy Crush' game. 
1. STRIP visual noise (confetti, bubbles, rainbows) unless it's a 'Big Win' moment.
2. USE spacing. `p-6` inside cards is minimum.
3. FOCUS on the numbers. They are the product. Make them big, monospaced, and legible.
4. DARK MODE is the priority. Ensure `dark:` classes are robust.

do_not_use: Gradients on text that make it unreadable
Shadows that look dirty (use colored shadows with low opacity)
must_use: Lucide icons with stroke-width={1.5} for elegance
